blended.narrative: Montana Snowbowl is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,918 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 71".
